landing.subtitle: Say goodbye to generic job boards. Get hyper-tailored internship matches based on your unique skills, interests, and future career goals.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Our AI engine works around the clock to ensure you land the internship that actually matters for your career.
landing.feat1Desc: Proprietary algorithms that match your personality and skills with company cultures and job requirements.
landing.feat2Desc: Deep NLP analysis of your resume to identify hidden technical and soft skills you might have missed.
landing.feat3Desc: Instantly see what skills you need to learn to qualify for your dream roles at top tech companies.
landing.feat4Desc: Data-driven forecasts on where your current internship could lead you in the next 5-10 years.
landing.feat5Desc: A benchmark score that tells you exactly how prepared you are for competitive application cycles.
landing.feat6Desc: Live updates on trending skills and high-demand internship roles across various industries.
landing.pipelineSubtitle: How we process your profile to find your future.
landing.dashPreviewSubtitle: A live preview of how your recommendations look.
landing.basedOn: Based on your Python & React skills
landing.footerDesc: The AI-powered future of internship discovery and career growth for the next generation of talent.
dash.completeProfile: Complete your profile to unlock AI-powered recommendations.
dash.readyMsg: Your readiness score and top matches are ready.
dash.noRecDesc: Complete your profile to get AI-matched internships
chat.title: AI Career Assistant
chat.greeting: Hi! 👋 I'm your **AI Career Assistant** powered by Google Gemini. Ask me anything about internships, skills, resumes, or career paths!
chat.q2: What skills should I learn next?
chat.q4: Suggest a career path for me
chat.placeholder: Ask anything about careers, skills, internships...
chat.error: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.
